content.en:
"Lord Cangwan Zhenjun, my son is Zhao Yu, who joined the Terran genius sequence and joined the Yunxiao Sect! I remember that the Terran genius sequence had a rule that the mortal genius family cannot be condemned to death if there is no major crime. Moreover, anyone who kills the genius relatives of the Terran will also be punished by the Terran!"

The Thorn God remembered this rule and hurriedly said it.

"Your son has joined the Terran genius sequence?" Ye Tian asked.

"Not bad!" said the Thorn God quickly.

"What sequence is it?"

Ye Tian asked again.

The geniuses of the human race are divided into three grades: the first sequence, the second sequence, and the third sequence, which he personally stipulated, and the geniuses of each sequence level are cultivated according to the same treatment.

Among them, the geniuses of the first sequence are the most worthy of cultivation.

"Second sequence!" replied the Thorn God.

"Where is the Cloud Heaven Sect?" Ye Tian asked the Vast True Monarch.

The Vast True Monarch explained the location of the Cloud Heaven Sect.

......

Terran, the headquarters of the Cloud Sect.

At this time, the Yunxiao Sect was holding a grand ceremony for true disciples.

Zhao Yu, a genius of the human race, has just stepped into the god general level and has been included in the list of true legends by the Yunxiao Sect.

Suddenly.

A supreme hand stepped into the void and descended to the Sky Sect and grabbed Zhao Yu.

"Who dares to capture our true disciple of the Cloud Sky Sect?"

A loud shout rang out.

Rumble!!!

The Great Elder of the Cloud Heaven Sect and the Heavenly Fortune True Monarch of the half-step True Ancestor made a move, wanting to intercept this big hand.

However, this big hand stretched out a finger, and with a flick of it, the Heavenly Fortune True Monarch was directly bounced out, crashing through the large array of the Cloud Heaven Sect, not knowing where it flew to the Void Heaven True Country.

Everyone knows that the owner of this big hand is a true ancestor, and not an ordinary true ancestor.

And Zhao Yu had no one to support him, so he was directly arrested by the big hands.

Yunxiao Sect was very curious, who was the owner of that big hand, and why did he arrest Zhao Yu?

Black Wolf City.

Ye Tian had just crossed a long distance and captured Zhao Yu from the Cloud Sky Sect.

When Zhao Yu appeared here and saw his ancestor, he was dumbfounded: "Ancestor!"

When the Thorn God General saw Zhao Yu, he was also confused: "Yu'er, why are you here?"

"He was captured by me from the Cloud Sky Sect!" Ye Tian said coldly: "I just glanced at your past, as a genius of the second sequence of the human race, if you slaughter foreign enemies, I won't care, but you have created a lot of dirty things in the human race, and even the Zhao family's trafficking of women, you have also participated." "

"Who are you? I am a genius of the second order of the Terrans, and I am blessed by the supreme palace of the Terrans, so you dare to kill me?"

Zhao Yu raised his head and said.

The supreme law of the supreme hall of the human race is there, and he is not afraid that Ye Tian will dare to kill him.

"Bold, you dare to be rude to Lord Wanfa True Ancestor!"

Cang Vast True Monarch snorted coldly.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor !!!!"

Zhao Yu trembled, stared at Ye Tian incredulously, and said, "You are the Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor?"

"What do you say?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Zhao Yu hurriedly knelt on the ground and kept begging for mercy: "Lord Wanfa True Ancestor, please spare me, I know that I am wrong!"

He was different from his own ancestor Thorn Divine General, the Thorn Divine General had hardly been out of the vast continent, and he had never heard of the name of the Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor.

But he is a genius of the Yunxiao Sect, where has he never heard of the true ancestor of the human race!

It can be said that the glory of the entire human race was brought by the true ancestor of ten thousand laws, and the true ancestors of the entire human race were almost all cultivated by the true ancestor of ten thousand laws.

The strength of the Ten Thousand Law True Ancestors far surpassed the other True Ancestors of the Human Race, and it could even be said that it was the First True Ancestor of the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and its reputation shocked countless great forces.

"Yu'er, who is the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws?"

The Thorn God asked.

"The one with the highest status in the human race is also the number one True Ancestor powerhouse in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm!" Zhao Yu said in despair.

"What!"

The god of thorns will be like ashes.

It's useless, it's useless!

Under the Tianshan Mountains, there is no one to save him.

Even if he moved out of a powerful backer, it would not be as big as Ye Tian.

At this moment, he finally understood why the Vast True Monarch was so afraid, in the eyes of that Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, the Vast True Monarch was just an ant!

"Terran, where are the guardians!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Rumble!!!!!

One True Ancestor after another appeared, and he was the guardian of the Terran Temple, this was the combat power that Ye Tian cultivated for the Terran Race, and he specialized in governing the Terran Race.

"I've seen Lord Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor!"

One by one, the true ancestors bowed and said.

"Thoroughly investigate the affairs of the Zhao family, and detain the vast true monarch, if he is involved, kill!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

The Terran Guardians answered.

The Vast True Monarch did not resist, and his face was as dead as ashes.

Although he did not participate in the affairs of the Zhao family, his foundation is not clean, once it is thoroughly investigated, with the things he did, I am afraid it will be a dead word!

At this time, he hated the Zhao family extremely much, if it weren't for the Zhao family provoking the Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor, he would not have ended up like this!

The people of the Zhao family were taken away, and the vast true monarch was also beaten away.

---------------

Home in Black Wolf City.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue are like two curious babies, with countless words in their hearts to ask.

"You want to know who your parents are, right?"

Ye Tian looked at his children and said with a smile.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue said.

"Do you know how big the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is, how big the Void Innocent Kingdom is, and how big the Terran is?" Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue shook their heads.

They are only extraordinary, they have been active in the area of Black Wolf City, and they haven't even gone out of the Silver and Blue Country, how can they know the outside world!

I saw Ye Tian open his mouth and say: "The Silver Blue Country is just a small country, the entire Vast Continent has countless countries, and the entire Human Race also has countless starry sky continents like the Vast Continent, and although the territory of the Human Race is large, it only occupies a small area of the Void Heaven True Country. And in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the Void Heaven True Kingdom only occupies a very small realm. "

"You know the god level, and above the god level is the god general, and the thorn god general just now is one of the god generals. Above the gods is the Heavenly Monarch, above the Heavenly Monarch is the True Monarch, the Vast True Monarch is a True Monarch, and the human race has countless True Monarchs. There are also half-step True Ancestors and True Ancestors above the True Monarch, and the True Ancestors are divided into ordinary True Ancestors, elite True Ancestors and top True Ancestors, and the top True Ancestors are already the top combat power in the entire Void Heaven True Country. But above the top True Ancestor, there is also the strongest True Ancestor and the invincible True Ancestor. "

"If the entire human race is compared to the Black Wolf City, then the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is the Vast Continent, understand?"

"As for your father and I, I am the strongest of the human race, and I am also the strongest of the Void Heaven True Realm, and similarly, in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, no one at the True Ancestor level is my opponent. However, if the entire human race does not have me, it can only be regarded as a small force. "

After Ye Tian's narration, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were completely shocked.

Heaven and earth are too big, and their father Ye Tian is too powerful!

"Isn't that mother also very strong?" Ye Xingyue asked.

"That's right!" Ye Tian said with a smile: "Your mother is the second strongest person in the human race, and her top True Ancestor combat power is enough to rank among the top ten in the entire Void Heaven True Country. "

"Then why are we so weak!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were a little disappointed.

"Hehe, you are also very powerful in your own right, and you are stronger than any thorn god general as soon as you make a move, but we are worried that you will easily become a gentleman in the environment of the compliments of countless strong people of the human race, just like the Zhao family, so we brought you to this small city, and sealed your strength and cultivated your temperament. You guys were very nice and didn't let us down!"

Ye Tiandao.

"I see!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue suddenly realized, and they also recognized and agreed with their parents' behavior.

They don't want to be like the Zhao family, they only hate that kind of person.

Now that they know who they are, they are all very happy.

Next, Ye Tian lifted the seal of Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, and their powerful flesh bodies that were originally close to the Heavenly Monarch level were revealed.

Next, they only need to slowly control their bodies, which is enough to burst out with the combat power of the top god generals.

Of course, they can also continue to cultivate, improve their divine power, and become divine generals step by step.

The other side.

The guardian of the human race acted very quickly, completely purging the vast continent, countless families and forces were wiped out one after another, and the vast true ancestor was also killed, and a true monarch was replaced as the lord of the starry sky continent of the vast continent.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned to the Terran Temple, gathered the true ancestors of the Terran Race, and started a meeting that would affect the future of the Terran Race.
